'''鈭歞h-sh-r-th''' ('''kadhashrethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jellify|jellify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jellify|jellify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-sh-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadhashrethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhashrethoko|thidhashrethoko]] || [[word:jidhashrethoko|jidhashrethoko]] || [[word:shidhashrethoko|shidhashrethoko]] || [[word:kidhashrethoko|kidhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhashrethoko|thuthudhashrethoko]] || [[word:jujudhashrethoko|jujudhashrethoko]] || [[word:shushudhashrethoko|shushudhashrethoko]] || [[word:kukudhashrethoko|kukudhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhashrethoko|thudhashrethoko]] || [[word:judhashrethoko|judhashrethoko]] || [[word:shudhashrethoko|shudhashrethoko]] || [[word:kudhashrethoko|kudhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhashrethoko|thudhashrethoko]] || [[word:judhashrethoko|judhashrethoko]] || [[word:shudhashrethoko|shudhashrethoko]] || [[word:kudhashrethoko|kudhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhashrethoko|thedhashrethoko]] || [[word:jedhashrethoko|jedhashrethoko]] || [[word:shedhashrethoko|shedhashrethoko]] || [[word:kedhashrethoko|kedhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhashrethoko|thothodhashrethoko]] || [[word:jojodhashrethoko|jojodhashrethoko]] || [[word:shoshodhashrethoko|shoshodhashrethoko]] || [[word:kokodhashrethoko|kokodhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhashrethoko|thodhashrethoko]] || [[word:jodhashrethoko|jodhashrethoko]] || [[word:shodhashrethoko|shodhashrethoko]] || [[word:kodhashrethoko|kodhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhashrethoko|thodhashrethoko]] || [[word:jodhashrethoko|jodhashrethoko]] || [[word:shodhashrethoko|shodhashrethoko]] || [[word:kodhashrethoko|kodhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhashrethoko|th忙dhashrethoko]] || [[word:j忙dhashrethoko|j忙dhashrethoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhashrethoko|sh忙dhashrethoko]] || [[word:k忙dhashrethoko|k忙dhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhashrethoko|thathadhashrethoko]] || [[word:jajadhashrethoko|jajadhashrethoko]] || [[word:shashadhashrethoko|shashadhashrethoko]] || [[word:kakadhashrethoko|kakadhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhashrethoko|thadhashrethoko]] || [[word:jadhashrethoko|jadhashrethoko]] || [[word:shadhashrethoko|shadhashrethoko]] || [[word:kadhashrethoko|kadhashrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhashrethoko|thadhashrethoko]] || [[word:jadhashrethoko|jadhashrethoko]] || [[word:shadhashrethoko|shadhashrethoko]] || [[word:kadhashrethoko|kadhashrethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhashrethithi|shadhashrethithi]] || [[word:shadhashrethiji|shadhashrethiji]] || [[word:shadhashrethishi|shadhashrethishi]] || [[word:shadhashrethiki|shadhashrethiki]]

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]]

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]] || [[word:shadhashreth茂f|shadhashreth茂f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhashreth忙th忙|shadhashreth忙th忙]] || [[word:shadhashreth忙j忙|shadhashreth忙j忙]] || [[word:shadhashreth忙sh忙|shadhashreth忙sh忙]] || [[word:shadhashreth忙k忙|shadhashreth忙k忙]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
